title: I Know A Man
content:
I know a man
who photographed the view he saw
from the window of the room where he made love
and not the face of the woman he loved there.
meaning:
"I Know A Man" is a quintessential example of Yehuda Amichai's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
